title: Frontier Walk
description: A small reviewed shelf of honest unknowns at the edge of craft, learning, life, and the universe.
content_is: unresolved questions, not instructions or settled knowledge

visit.reading_note: Every link is optional. Open at most three links per card; stopping earlier is complete.
reflection_questions: What does the source actually show?
Which part is inference or remains unknown?
What one result would move the boundary?
visit.stop: Three cards is complete. Leaving with an unknown is complete.

rights.card_text: Mindicraft-authored metadata under the repository MIT licence.
rights.linked_sources: Links and short paraphrases do not change the linked source's rights.
rights.castle_refs: Castle map references are link-only: NOASSERTION and no licence grant.

cards.title: When hands answer back
cards.question: Which guide would change first if its steps met real hands, materials, and weather?

known.text: The build labels a guide hand-tested only when its evidence record says hand-tested; every other guide is labelled tradition-asserted.
At review time, the committed evidence registry contains no entries.

unknown: Which instructions fail first across different materials, climates, bodies, and skill levels.
How much independent observation is enough to call a practical guide hand-tested.
evidence_that_would_move_it: Independent field notes that name the setting, materials, exact step, observed outcome, and correction.
A repeat test showing whether the correction travels to another setting.
inquiry_lenses: Which step makes the most assumptions about material, climate, or prior skill?
What observation would show that the wording, rather than the craft, caused a failure?

cards.title: Do the arrows carry weight?
cards.question: Which needs arrows are truly required, and which are useful preparation?

known.text: Mindicraft uses needs arrows to build a learning path, but its data has no field that distinguishes strict requirement from helpful preparation.

unknown: Which edges are physically necessary, which are safety scaffolds, and which are merely a sensible teaching order.
Whether those relations remain true across environments and learners.
evidence_that_would_move_it: Paired attempts with and without the named prerequisite, recording safety, success, and hidden substitutions.
A relation vocabulary that separates required, safer-after, easier-after, and conventional-order.
inquiry_lenses: What becomes impossible if this prerequisite is removed?
What becomes riskier or harder but still possible?

cards.title: Four tongues, one physical skill
cards.question: When one physical skill crosses four languages, what must remain invariant?

known.text: The same guide slugs and tree relations are shared across Mindicraft's four language editions.

unknown: Whether every translated warning points to the same physical sign, boundary, and action.
Which local materials or customs make a literal translation technically misleading.
evidence_that_would_move_it: Bilingual review tied to a shared object, image, measurement, or observed outcome.
Hand tests in more than one language and place, with disagreements kept rather than averaged away.
inquiry_lenses: Which physical referent must stay the same when the words change?
Where might a locally correct explanation need different examples rather than parallel wording?

cards.title: Two windows on learning
cards.question: Does a lesson an agent reconstructs easily predict what a human can learn?

known.text: Mindicraft can return a guide with its prerequisites as prompt-ready text, but its evidence registry records no paired agent and human learning outcomes.

unknown: Whether fluent reconstruction by an agent predicts correct later performance by a person.
Which parts of teachability are shared across model, learner, body, and environment.
evidence_that_would_move_it: Paired tests on the same skill that separate restatement, procedural accuracy, delayed recall, and independent performance.
Results across multiple guides rather than one unusually easy or difficult lesson.
inquiry_lenses: Which success measure belongs to the words, and which belongs to later action?
What result would make agent fluency a poor proxy for human learning?

cards.title: When text answers back
cards.question: When an agent gives a guide a voice, which misunderstandings can text repair, and which need the world to answer?

known.text: Mindicraft's client can assemble one guide and its prerequisites as text; the static build does not observe a learner acting in the world.

unknown: Which errors can be repaired through better explanation alone.
Which errors require feedback from a person, place, material, or measured outcome.
evidence_that_would_move_it: A repair log separating questions answered from the page from questions settled only by external observation.
Transfer tests showing whether a repaired explanation survives a new setting.
inquiry_lenses: Which question can the page answer from its own evidence?
Which question would be dishonest to answer without a person, place, object, or measurement?

cards.title: The invisible scaffolding
cards.question: What is dark matter?

known.text: Galaxy motion, cluster behavior, and gravitational lensing reveal gravitational effects that visible matter alone does not account for.

unknown: The composition of the unseen component.
Whether one candidate explanation accounts for the observations at every scale.
evidence_that_would_move_it: A reproducible detection that identifies a candidate and matches the astronomical effects.
An alternative model that makes distinct predictions and survives observations that separate it from particle candidates.
inquiry_lenses: Which observations measure an effect directly, and which properties enter through a model?
What result would distinguish a new particle from a change to gravity?

references.title: Dark Matter
references.rights: NASA source keeps its own rights.

cards.title: Where gravity meets the quantum
cards.question: Can gravity and quantum theory fit one tested framework?

known.text: The Standard Model describes three fundamental interactions but does not include gravity, and CERN describes fitting gravity into that quantum framework as unresolved.

unknown: Which mathematical framework, if any, describes both quantum phenomena and gravity without contradiction.
Which reachable observation could separate leading approaches.
evidence_that_would_move_it: A coherent theory that recovers established results and makes a distinct, testable prediction.
An observation whose outcome rules out meaningful parts of the candidate space.
inquiry_lenses: Where do the two existing frameworks make contact rather than merely live at different scales?
What prediction would make a proposed unification vulnerable to being wrong?

references.title: The Standard Model
references.rights: CERN source keeps its own rights.

cards.title: The first living threshold
cards.question: How did nonliving chemistry become an evolvable living system?

known.text: NASA Astrobiology treats life's origin and even a universal definition of life as open questions.

unknown: The sequence, setting, and selection pressures that connected prebiotic chemistry to the first evolvable systems.
Which features of Earth life's path are necessary and which are historical accidents.
evidence_that_would_move_it: A reproducible pathway under plausible early conditions that crosses from chemistry into sustained inheritance and evolution.
Independent natural evidence that distinguishes among competing settings or sequences.
inquiry_lenses: Which step is demonstrated in isolation, and which connection between steps remains missing?
What would count as evolution before a modern cell exists?

references.title: About Astrobiology
references.rights: NASA source keeps its own rights.

cards.title: Another living world
cards.question: Is there life beyond Earth?

known.text: Many thousands of planets beyond the Solar System are known, while NASA reports no evidence of life beyond Earth so far.

unknown: Whether life began elsewhere and how common it is.
Which remote signs would survive every plausible nonliving explanation.
evidence_that_would_move_it: Independent, converging observations of a candidate biosignature with nonliving alternatives actively tested.
Directly sampled evidence with contamination and chain of custody accounted for.
inquiry_lenses: What has been observed, and what has only been inferred about habitability?
Which nonliving process could imitate the proposed sign of life?

references.title: Are We Alone?
references.rights: NASA source keeps its own rights.

trails.title: Hands, words, learners
trails.bridge_question: What must remain true when a skill moves from a page, through an agent, into different hands and languages?

trails.title: The map meets the ground
trails.bridge_question: Where does a map stop describing the world and start depending on it?

trails.title: When the page gets a voice
trails.bridge_question: When can an answering explanation bridge a gap, and when must evidence come from beyond the page?

trails.title: The unseen universe
trails.bridge_question: What turns an unseen possibility into something the universe has actually shown?

trails.title: What counts as evidence
trails.bridge_question: When testimony, hands, and instruments disagree, what would make one boundary move?
